title: Pay_everything
description: This is a mod that has currency, an ATM, and a laptop for purchasing items.
body:
Currency: Adding currency to the game allows players to earn money through various game mechanics, such as mining resources, fighting monsters, or completing quests. This creates a new level of economy in Minecraft, allowing players to barter and trade.

ATMs: The introduction of ATMs into the game provides players with the ability to keep their funds safe and manage their finances. They can deposit or withdraw money, check balances, and perhaps even conduct other financial transactions.

Laptops for Purchasing Items: Laptops provide an interface to access a store or item catalog where players can purchase various goods and items using their in-game currency. This may include weapons, armor, tools, rare items, etc.

These features can greatly enrich the gameplay and user experience in Minecraft:

Deeper Economy: The addition of a currency and trading system allows players to create economic strategies, trade resources and items, and develop their own businesses within the game.

Improved Financial Management: ATMs enable players to effectively manage their money, keeping it safe and easily available when needed.

Convenient Shopping System: Using a laptop to purchase items makes the process of purchasing things more convenient and intuitive, making it easier for players to access various items and increasing gameplay satisfaction.

Overall, the addition of these features will allow players to enjoy Minecraft in a new way, enriching the game world with variety and additional interaction options.
